messages.content:
Summarize the CVE description using precise cybersecurity language.

SQL Injection vulnerability discovered in Gila CMS 1.15.4 and earlier allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary web scripts via the Area parameter under the Administration>Widget tab after the login portal.

An SQL Injection vulnerability in Gila CMS versions 1.15.4 and prior allows remote attackers to run arbitrary queries by manipulating the 'Area' parameter within the Administration > Widget tab, post-authentication.
